body: Если formal-ai сможет вычлинять информацию из истории будет очень круто

comments.body:
We need to support multiple natural language queries to the history of the dialog, and the whole memory.

We also need to support natural language queries to the entire memory. So we should have something much more powerful than SQL, GraphQL and so on.

Natural language queries to the links (associative) memory.

title: Надо сделать что бы FormalAI умел работать с историей
